title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Dry Skin
description: Symphytum officinale tinctures contains mucilages, which are thick, protective substances that help soothe and moisturize dry skin. This plant, also known as comfrey, has anti-inflammatory properties and is rich in antioxidants, which can help reduce redness and irritation associated with dry skin. The constituents of Symphytum officinale, including allantoin, rosmarinic acid, and flavonoids, work together to provide a protective barrier on the skin's surface, locking in moisture and s...
